description: You are an AP Statistics teacher preparing a data analysis lesson on the relationship between national income and population health outcomes. Using the data in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/data/world_development.csv, create a GeoGebra visualization comparing linear and logarithmic regression models for GNI per capita (x-axis) and life expectancy (y-axis). The visualization must include a scatter plot of all 15 data points, both regression models, and text labels displaying the regression equations. Save the project as world_regression.ggb in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
